taxonomy: Syntherisma simpsonii is classified within the family Crambidae of the order Lepidoptera. This classification places it among the snout moths, a diverse group of insects. Syntherisma simpsonii's classification is further supported by its morphological characteristics, such as its wing pattern and antennal structure. As a member of Crambidae, Syntherisma simpsonii shares similarities with other snout moths in its life cycle and habits. This classification provides valuable insights into the evolutionary history and relationships of Syntherisma simpsonii within the Lepidoptera order.
